Container.Name: BlogPusher
Container.Overview: Self-hosted blog publishing server for Hugo + GitHub Pages sites. Draft posts with Claude on mobile, send via HTTP Shortcuts, and BlogPusher pushes them directly to your GitHub repo via the API — no git CLI required. Includes a web UI for publishing, managing, and setting up new blogs.
Container.Description: Self-hosted blog publishing server for Hugo + GitHub Pages sites. Draft posts with Claude on mobile, send via HTTP Shortcuts, and BlogPusher pushes them directly to your GitHub repo via the API — no git CLI required. Includes a web UI for publishing, managing, and setting up new blogs.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the BlogPusher web interface. Change this if running multiple instances for different blogs.

Config.Name: GitHub Token
Config.Description: GitHub Personal Access Token with Contents read/write on your blog repo. Create at github.com/settings/tokens (fine-grained, select your blog repo, enable Contents read/write).

Config.Name: GitHub Repo
Config.Description: Your blog repo in owner/repo format — e.g. yourname/blog

Config.Name: Site URL
Config.Description: Your blog's public URL — e.g. https://yourname.github.io or just yourname.github.io (https:// is optional)

Config.Name: GitHub Branch
Config.Description: Branch to push posts to. Almost always main.
